name: Ria Money Transfer & Currency Exchange
description_short: Ria Money Transfer operates a global remittance network with hundreds of agent locations across the U.S., enabling customers to send and receive money internationally through multiple channels.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an international money transfer service that facilitates cross-border payments through an extensive network of physical agent locations and digital platforms. The company was founded to provide accessible remittance services to individuals and families sending money to over 36 countries across Africa, Asia, Europe, Latin America, North America, and Oceania.

Ria offers multiple ways to send money: online via their website, through their mobile app, in person at agent locations, and via WhatsApp. For receiving funds, customers can choose from bank deposit, cash pickup at agent locations, digital wallet funding, home delivery, or ATM withdrawal. The company also provides ancillary services including bill payment, currency conversion tools, IBAN calculation, and money transfer tracking. Their agent network includes partnerships with major retailers like 7-Eleven as well as independent check cashing outlets and multiservice businesses.

Ria distinguishes itself through its multi-channel approach and extensive geographic reach, allowing customers flexibility in how they send and receive funds. The integration with major retail chains like 7-Eleven provides 24-hour access at many locations. Their platform supports WhatsApp as a payment channel, reflecting adaptation to modern communication preferences. The company also offers business partnership opportunities through agent and digital partner programs.

As a remittance service, Ria's value proposition depends heavily on competitive exchange rates and transfer fees, which are not disclosed on the location-finder page. The lack of transparent pricing information on their public-facing website is a notable limitation for consumers evaluating costs. While their multi-channel model provides convenience, customers must verify rates and fees before committing to transfers, and some locations may have limited hours despite 24-hour availability at certain agent types.
pros: Extensive agent network with 24-hour access at select 7-Eleven and check cashing locations
Multiple send channels: online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp
Five receive options including bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, and ATM withdrawal
Serves 36+ countries across all major continents
Bill payment service available at many agent locations
Free currency converter and IBAN calculator tools on website
Mobile app enables money transfers on-the-go without visiting physical locations
cons: No exchange rates or transfer fees displayed on website—customers must contact agents or login to see pricing
Many agent locations have limited hours (closures or restricted evening/weekend availability)
Heavy reliance on third-party agent network means service quality and customer experience may vary by location
No mention of consumer protection guarantees, fraud protection, or complaint resolution process on location page
Limited information about verification requirements or compliance procedures for international transfers
best_for: Immigrants and diaspora communities sending regular remittances to family abroad
International travelers needing to access funds or send money from multiple locations
Customers who prefer cash-based transactions over bank deposits for receiving funds
Businesses and individuals making frequent international bill payments
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for customers with established international connections who prioritize convenience and multi-channel access over transparent pricing. The main caveat is that actual transfer costs and exchange rates are not publicly displayed on their website, requiring customers to engage directly with agents or create an account to compare pricing against competitors.
services: In-person money transfers at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer operates hundreds of agent locations across the U.S., enabling international money transfers.
